message: Retrieving content for: Create a URL shortener web app. FastAPI + SQLite b

args.query: Create a URL shortener web app. FastAPI + SQLite backend with: POST /shorten (accepts url, returns short code), GET /{code} (redirects), GET /stats/{code} (returns click count). Simple HTML frontend. Separate files: models.py, routes.py, database.py, main.py, templates/index.html.
